description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10) and PyTorch versions (1.10.2+cpu, 1.11.0+cpu, 1.12.1+cpu, 1.13.0+cpu) on ubuntu-latest. For each combination, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, install PyTorch and the current package, and run tests with pytest.
